claim_boundary: No superiority claim unless real-data metrics pass predefined thresholds.
publication_boundary: RLL is a candidate effective dynamic-transition cosmology under real-data evaluation.

data/real/rll_real_sources_manifest_2026.reason: The GitHub connector returned the committed blob SHA; exact raw-file SHA256 and byte count must be produced by running scripts/ingest_real_cosmology_sources.py in a checked-out working tree. No placeholder value is asserted.

anti_placeholder_policy: Do not use REGENERATE_WITH_SCRIPT_AFTER_CHECKOUT, TO_BE_REGENERATED_BY_SCRIPT, dummy hashes, guessed bytes, guessed covariance or synthetic measurements. Use real observed values, committed Git blob SHAs, or explicit null with reason.
